description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named FBGEMM_GPU Nightly Build that runs on a schedule, on push to main, on pull requests to main, and manually. The workflow has two jobs: build_artifact and test_and_publish_artifact. The build_artifact job runs on a linux.12xlarge host, sets up the environment, installs dependencies, builds FBGEMM_GPU, and uploads the built wheel as a GHA artifact. The test_and_publish_artifact job runs on a linux.g5.4xlarge.nvidia.gpu host, downloads the artifact, tests FBGEMM_GPU, and pushes the nightly binary to PyPI if the CUDA version matches.
